title: Environmental Health Specialist
description: We're hiring a Environmental Health Specialist at NYU Langone Health. This is an exciting opportunity to join our academic, research-focused, NYC-based team and make a direct impact on our mission. If you have 2-3 years years of experience and are passionate about Academic Medicine, we'd love to hear from you.
responsibilities: Contribute to team projects and strategic initiatives
Collaborate with cross-functional teams on deliverables
Support management with analysis and reporting
Identify process improvements and efficiency opportunities
Participate in professional development and training activities

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Environmental Health, Public Health, or related field
